name: Natural Wicker Storage Bench Brown - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Metal Frame, Fish Scale Pattern, No Assembly Required
description: Add a classic seating option to your home while getting a convenient spot for the extras with this Natural Woven Storage Bench from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. This rectangle bench features a woven design to bring textured charm to your space. The rectangular silhouette with a lid on top elevates the look and provides ample space for your throws, blankets and more. You can place this natural-shade storage bench in your living room, entryway or any other room.
